case_title: THE RECOVAR GROUP, LLC VS. QDM COMPANY,INC.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE RECOVAR GROUP, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QDM COMPANY,INC. $8,972.56 PRINCIPAL, $292.79 INTEREST, $120.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,385.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE RECOVAR GROUP, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT QDM COMPANY,INC.

documents.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE RECOVAR GROUP, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QDM COMPANY,INC. $8,972.56 PRINCIPAL, $292.79 INTEREST, $120.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,385.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
